overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a luxurious penthouse apartment at night. The player passes a heavily armored cyborg character standing in the living area and continues toward a modern bar with panoramic city views.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment entry foyer with wooden floors

events.description: red visual barrier effect dissipates revealing the interior space

agents.ego_description: moving through a visual distortion into a warmly lit luxury apartment with wooden slat ceilings

illuminated circular light fixture on the far wall
white built-in shelving units with horizontal slats
round seating ottoman with red cushion
tall dark cabinet with glowing red light

segments.scene_description: The player enters a luxury apartment through a dissolving red visual barrier. The space features warm wooden slat ceilings, built-in white shelving, and modern furnishings including a red ottoman and dark cabinet, all under soft artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: main living area with armored figure

events.description: camera slows and circles slightly around the armored character

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a heavily armored cyborg character standing against the wall

notable_agents.action: heavily armored cyborg standing motionless against the wall holding a large weapon

entered.detail: tall figure in red and chrome heavy combat armor with glowing elements
modern bar area visible in the background with teal lighting

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the living area where a massive armored cyborg stands against the wall. The camera approaches and circles the character, revealing intricate red and chrome armor details, while a modern bar area becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar and lounge area with city views

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from warm amber to cool teal and blue tones near the windows
camera approaches a sliding door with a technical ability prompt appearing

agents.ego_description: moving past the armored character toward the bar area and approaching a door on the left

entered.detail: large panoramic windows showing night cityscape with neon lights
reflective water pool with blue ambient lighting along the window
sleek kitchen counter with items and warm underlighting
metal sliding door with red neon light strip above

segments.scene_description: Passing the armored figure, the player enters a sophisticated bar area with teal neon lighting and panoramic city views through floor-to-ceiling windows. An indoor water feature reflects the ambient light as the player approaches a sliding metal door marked with a red light strip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a luxurious penthouse that transitions from a warm, enclosed living space into a cool, neon-lit lounge with panoramic city views. It begins as the camera passes through a dissolving red visual barrier into a room characterized by wooden slat ceilings, white shelving, and soft artificial lighting. As the camera moves deeper into the living area, it circles a massive armored cyborg in red and chrome, shifting the focus from the interior decor toward the open layout of the apartment. The scene then expands into a sophisticated bar area where the warm tones give way to teal neon lighting and the reflection of an indoor water feature. Finally, the camera glides past floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the city skyline before approaching a sliding metal door marked with a red light strip.
